omitted_declarations.policy_reference: For reasons of fraud prevention, payouts that users earn through the use of the App will only be possible after additional user verification via a selfie taken with the device's camera when first requesting a payout. Consent to the processing of personal data therefore already applies to the processing of these photos. I acknowledge that selfies are also special-category personal data per Art. 9 para. 1 GDPR and expressly consent to the processing described below.

When contacting us via the App/email, your details are stored for the purpose of processing the enquiry and, if applicable, follow-up questions based on your consent based on the legal basis of Art. 6 (1) a. GDPR or fulfilling your request based on Art. 6 (1) b. GDPR.
